label: Speech synthesis, voice & music generation

node.label: Speech synthesis, voice & music generation
node.definition: Speech and audio generators synthesize voices, sound effects, music, or acoustic scenes from text, scores, reference audio, or control signals.
node.why_it_matters: This system is an application boundary where technical capability, evidence, safety controls, economics, and user workflow must succeed together.
examples: workflows combining Speech synthesis, voice & music generation with Diffusion & score-based models
workflows combining Speech synthesis, voice & music generation with Transformers
workflows combining Speech synthesis, voice & music generation with Waveforms, audio & spectrograms
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Diffusion & score-based models, Transformers.

dependencies.rationale: Speech synthesis, voice & music generation integrates Diffusion & score-based models as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Speech synthesis, voice & music generation integrates Transformers as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Speech synthesis, voice & music generation integrates Waveforms, audio & spectrograms as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
In this atlas graph, Speech synthesis, voice & music generation has an `applies` dependency on Autoregressive decoding with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, Speech synthesis, voice & music generation has an `applies` dependency on Generation-time watermarking with `common` strength.
Speech synthesis, voice & music generation integrates Content credentials, signing & provenance as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
